parameters.query: SELECT d.document_id, d.client_id, d.document_uuid, d.original_filename, d.category, d.status, de.result_data, de.confidence_score FROM documents d LEFT JOIN document_extractions de ON d.document_id = de.document_id WHERE d.status = 'extracted' ORDER BY d.priority DESC, d.received_at ASC LIMIT 15;
UPDATE documents SET validation_status = 'passed', validation_score = $1, validation_errors = NULL, validation_warnings = $2, status = 'validated', updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = $3;
UPDATE documents SET validation_status = 'failed', validation_score = $1, validation_errors = $2, validation_warnings = $3, status = 'validation_failed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = $4;

INSERT INTO document_extractions (document_id, client_id, extraction_type, status, result_data, confidence_score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, 'validation', 'completed', $3, $4, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO workflow_executions (client_id, workflow_name, workflow_id, execution_id, status, input_data, output_data, started_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'completed', $5, $6, NOW(), NOW());
